name: Hari Roti
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mint, fresh; or coriander leaves (cilantro); chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the whole wheat flour with salt.
2. Rub in 2 tablespoons ghee or oil.
3. Add mashed peas. Mix thoroughly.
4. Add pepper, coriander or mint with lime juice. Knead well.
5. Divide into 8 equal portions.
6. Shape them into round balls.
7. Roll each ball on a floured board into a circle, approximately 12 cm in diameter.
8. Lift each roti carefully with floured hands.
9. Place on a hot griddle one at a time.
10. Shallow fry with 1 or 2 tablespoons ghee or oil until both sides are well cooked.
